title: Consulting the log when planning a feature
question: When someone asks about a new feature, how does the tool decide to consult the existing decisions?
rationale: Add a read side to the capture-only tool: before a feature is decided, pull related past decisions, weigh their tradeoffs, and place it. Triggered both by an explicit subcommand and a guideline to consult on its own — chosen over either alone, which would miss cases or fire too eagerly.

tradeoffs.note: an explicit command gives a predictable, documentable handle
the guideline means it also fires when you just ask about a feature
two surfaces to document instead of one
won't fire unless the user names the command
fires on every passing feature mention — too magic
just a line in the skill instructions
no explicit handle to force a consult
